Class ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch.ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the builder type, used for self-referential generics to support method chaining in subclasses
Enclosing class:
ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor
public static class ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>> extends ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>
Builder for creating instances of ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.

This builder extends ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder and adds configuration options specific to tool search functionality.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov

      toolIndex - the ToolIndex instance

      this Builder instance for method chaining

    • maxResults

      public T maxResults(Integer maxResults)
      Sets the maximum number of tool references to return in tool search results. This is the human/user defined default value used when invoking the tool search tool.
      Parameters:
      maxResults -
      Returns:

    • sessionIdKeyName

      public T sessionIdKeyName(String sessionIdKeyName)
      Sets the key name in the context where the conversation ID is stored. By default, it is "conversationId", but it can be customized if the conversation ID is stored under a different key in the context.
      Parameters:
      sessionIdKeyName -
      Returns:

    • evictionStrategy

      public T evictionStrategy(ToolIndexEvictionStrategy evictionStrategy)
      Sets the eviction strategy that determines when session tool indexes are cleared from the advisor's cache.

      Defaults to new LruEvictionStrategy(1000), which retains indexes for at most 1 000 concurrently active sessions and silently evicts the least-recently-used one when the cap is exceeded. Adjust the cap to match the expected peak concurrency of your deployment — lower values reduce memory pressure, higher values reduce unnecessary re-indexing for services with many parallel conversations.

      Combine with TtlEvictionStrategy via CompositeEvictionStrategy to also release indexes for sessions that have been idle longer than a fixed duration.

      Parameters:
      evictionStrategy - the eviction strategy to use; must not be null
      Returns:
      this Builder instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • LruEvictionStrategy
      • TtlEvictionStrategy
      • CompositeEvictionStrategy

    • build

      public ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor build()
      Builds and returns a new ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor instance with the configured properties.
      Overrides:
      build in class ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>>
      Returns:
      a new ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if required parameters are null or invalid

    • newCopy

      protected ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<?> newCopy()
      Description copied from class: ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder
      Factory method called by ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder.copy() to create the blank builder instance that will receive the copied fields. Subclasses must override this to return an instance of their own builder type so that ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder.copy() preserves the full subtype.
      Overrides:
      newCopy in class ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>>
      Returns:
      a new, unconfigured builder of the same concrete type

    • copy

      public ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<?> copy()
      Description copied from class: ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder
      Creates a shallow copy of this builder with all current settings. The copy can be used as a template from which per-call overrides (e.g. conversationHistoryEnabled) are applied without mutating the original.

      Subclasses must override ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder.newCopy() to return an instance of their own type, and override this method to copy their additional fields into it.

      Overrides:
      copy in class ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T extends ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor.Builder<T>>
      Returns:
      a new ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder with the same configuration
